text.title: VPAT / ACR Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author uses VPAT 2.3 template; WCAG 2.2 SCs absent; report appears 'green' by omission.
Row marked 'Partially Supports' with empty remarks; procurement rejects ACR.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires non-empty remarks for any status != Supports.

antipattern.symptom: ACR published without signed_by; procurement returns it.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated ACR as marketing doc.
antipattern.fix: Sign with name + role + date; commit ownership.

antipattern.symptom: Row status 'Supports' without evaluation method; reviewer cannot verify.
antipattern.fix: Cite method per row (automated / manual / AT).
